_note: Companies in our watchlist that cannot currently surface ML/AI jobs. Three failure categories below. Review periodically — category 2 and 3 may self-correct as companies post new roles or as the code improves. Category 1 requires manual slug investigation.

category_1_slug_unresolvable._reason: LinkedIn company page slug is unknown or 404. All tried variants failed. Cannot resolve numeric company ID — watchlist skips these entirely.

companies.name: Nykaa
companies.why_we_want: Listed beauty/fashion unicorn — recommendation AI, visual search, demand forecasting

companies.name: Practo
companies.why_we_want: Healthtech platform — symptom checker AI, doctor recommendation, NLP for medical records

companies.name: Booking.com
companies.why_we_want: Search/recommendation ML, demand forecasting — Bengaluru ML team

category_2_linkedin_api_zero._reason: LinkedIn company ID resolved correctly but guest API returns 0 jobs for these companies. Confirmed limitation: the public guest API does not surface jobs for large companies without authentication. These companies DO have active ML/AI roles — they just aren't visible through the unauthenticated endpoint. MAANG is already covered by run_job_discovery.py keyword search so this is acceptable for now.

category_3_ml_title_filter_miss._reason: LinkedIn returns jobs for these companies but our ML title filter (_ML_TITLE_KEYWORDS) doesn't match their actual job titles. These companies use non-standard ML/AI role names like 'Decision Scientist', 'Analytics Engineer', 'Business Intelligence Engineer'. Fix: expand _ML_TITLE_KEYWORDS in watchlist_agent.py.
